title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.280 - Production of documentary evidence on taking of deposition, when
text:
492.280.  Production of documentary evidence on taking of deposition, when. — Upon order of the court in which a cause is pending, a subpoena may command the production of objects and documentary evidence on the taking of a deposition, and the court may also order a party to produce objects and documentary evidence on the taking of a deposition.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 142, A.L. 1985 S.B. 5, et al.)
